name: Events Page with Calendar and Nav Update
prompt: Create an Events page that lists our two upcoming workshops: 'Intro to Baking' on July 10th and 'Advanced Pastry' on July 24th. Add it to the navigation.

checks.judge: An Events page exists with both workshops listed, and a link to /events labeled 'Events' (or similar) appears in the site navigation

dry_run.text: I've created an Events page with both workshops listed in a calendar section and added 'Events' to your site navigation.

edits.content/pages/events.mdx:
---
title: Events
description: Upcoming workshops and events
---

<Hero
  heading="Upcoming Events"
  subheading="Join us for hands-on workshops and community gatherings"
/>
<Calendar
  heading="Workshop Schedule"
  events={[
    { date: "2025-07-10", title: "Intro to Baking", description: "Learn the fundamentals of baking in this beginner-friendly workshop" },
    { date: "2025-07-24", title: "Advanced Pastry", description: "Elevate your pastry skills with expert techniques" }
  ]}
/>
edits.content/settings.yaml:
siteName: My Business
description: Quality products and services
nav:

    href: /
  - label: Events
    href: /events
  - label: About
